metadata.name: kill_faucet
metadata.description: KILL Faucet — Solana/Anchor port of KillFaucet.sol

instructions.name: claim
docs: Claim 10% of the current faucet vault balance.
Callable once per wallet.  Claimer must hold ≥ 1 KILL already.

accounts.name: faucet_config
docs: Faucet config — provides vault address and signs vault transfers.

accounts.name: claim_record
docs: Claim record — `init` fails if this account already exists, which is
how we enforce the one-claim-per-wallet rule with zero extra code.
Seeds: [b"claim_record", claimer.key()]

accounts.name: faucet_vault
docs: Faucet vault — source of the claim transfer.

accounts.name: claimer_token_account
docs: Claimer's KILL token account — receives the faucet payout.

instructions.name: initialize_faucet
docs: One-time setup: creates the FaucetConfig PDA and vault token account.
After calling this, transfer KILL tokens to the vault to fund the faucet.

accounts.name: faucet_config
docs: Singleton config PDA — seeds: [b"faucet_config"]

accounts.name: kill_mint
docs: The KILL SPL mint (deploy KillToken first and pass its address here).

accounts.name: faucet_vault
docs: Faucet vault — a new token account whose authority is `faucet_config`.
Top up this account to fund the faucet.

errors.name: AlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: You have already claimed from the faucet

types.name: ClaimRecord
docs: One-per-wallet claim record — PDA seeds: [b"claim_record", claimer.key()]
The mere existence of this account proves a wallet has already claimed.
Because `init` is used (not `init_if_needed`), a second claim attempt will
fail with "account already in use" before our instruction logic even runs.

fields.name: claimer
docs: Wallet that claimed

fields.name: slot
docs: Slot at which the claim occurred

fields.name: bump
docs: Canonical bump

types.name: FaucetConfig
docs: Singleton faucet configuration — PDA seeds: [b"faucet_config"]
Holds the mint address and the vault token account.  The PDA itself is the
vault authority so the program can sign transfers without a private key.

fields.name: kill_mint
docs: SPL mint for the KILL token

fields.name: faucet_vault
docs: Faucet vault token account (PDA authority = this account)

fields.name: admin
docs: Admin wallet (can top-up or reclaim vault funds)

fields.name: bump
docs: Canonical bump for cheap PDA re-derivation
